mission: Validate that the tool Layer fix eliminates all TS2345 errors without introducing new issues

validation_steps.description: Verify no regression in other packages
validation_steps.command: cd /Users/user/Developer/GitHub/opencode-desktop-dev && bun typecheck 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | head -20
validation_steps.expected: No new errors in other packages beyond pre-existing ones

validation_steps.description: Verify Schema.Literal fix didn't introduce runtime issues
validation_steps.command: cd packages/opencode && rg 'Schema\.Literal\(' src/tool/ --no-filename | grep -v 'Schema\.Literals\[' | head -10
validation_steps.expected: No remaining Schema.Literal(a,b,c) patterns (only Schema.Literals([...]) allowed)
Only expected changes shown, no unintended modifications

validation_steps.description: Verify runtime safety by checking wrap() function still adds .pipe(Effect.orDie)

regression_risks: R generic on Def might not propagate correctly through Omit<>
Info<R> might break tool consumers that don't expect R
Schema.Literals might have different runtime behavior than Schema.Literal
